sidebar.vaultDesc: Your secrets are encrypted in memory. Closing the app clears all keys.

lock.unlockDescription: Enter your master password to unlock the vault.
lock.createDescription: Set a strong master password to protect your secrets.

dashboard.heading: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your vault, presets, and activity
dashboard.noActivePreset: No preset is currently activated for CLI shell injection.
dashboard.activePresetDetail: {{count}} env vars available in new shells
dashboard.activityHint: Actions like reveal, copy, and export will appear here
dashboard.getStartedDesc: Create your first service group to store API keys and secrets, then map them to a preset for easy environment injection.
dashboard.expiringKeysDesc: Keys that are expired or nearing expiration
dashboard.noExpiringKeys: No expiring keys — all keys are healthy

secretDetails.noKeys: No keys yet — add one to get started.

secretForm.editDescription: Update the provider info, endpoints, and metadata.
secretForm.newDescription: Add a provider and configure its endpoints and credentials.
secretForm.templateFieldsDesc: Start from common service metadata. Only encrypted or ENV-backed values become environment fields.
secretForm.envSectionDesc: These fields can be revealed/copied later and mapped into presets as environment variables.

keyForm.valuePlaceholderEdit: Leave blank to keep current value

validation.envFormat: Must be UPPERCASE with underscores (e.g. OPENAI_API_KEY)

keyCard.setEnvFirst: Set env name before adding to preset
keyCard.noActivePreset: No active preset to add to

preset.welcomeDesc: A local-first secret manager for developer workflows. Manage API keys and inject them as environment variables in your terminal.
preset.envInjectionDesc: Rather than loading raw text from .env files, use our CLI in your terminals:

presets.title: Presets
presets.composerDesc: Create a preset to map your secrets to environment variables for shell injection.
presets.detailsDesc: Map secrets to environment variables for this preset.

presetDetails.selectServiceTip: Select a service in the Secrets tab first
presetDetails.deleteConfirmMsg: Delete preset "{{name}}" and its variable mappings? This cannot be undone.
presetDetails.deleteConfirmActiveMsg: "{{name}}" is the active preset. Deleting it will deactivate the current environment and remove all variable mappings. This cannot be undone.
presetDetails.noEntries: No env vars mapped yet. Add entries to link your secrets to this preset.
presetDetails.noFieldsWithEnv: No fields with env var names found. Create fields in Secrets first.
presetDetails.previewDesc: These env vars will be available in new shells:
presetDetails.activateHint: Activate this preset to inject env vars into new shells

validation.envFormat: Must be UPPERCASE with underscores (e.g. DEEPSEEK_API_KEY)
validation.envDuplicate: This env name is already mapped in this preset

variableList.noVariables: No variables mapped — use the form above to add one.

runCommand.title: Shell Command
runCommand.description: Runs with the active KeyDock env cache sourced first, matching new terminal behavior.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.description: An immutable log of all secret, key, and mapping operations. Each entry records the action, target, preset, and timestamp. Secret values are never included.
audit.noMatching: No matching events for this filter.

shellIntegration.title: Shell Integration
shellIntegration.description: Install the zsh hook once to auto-source KeyDock environment variables in every new terminal session. This is a global one-time setup — no need to install per preset.
shellIntegration.warning: This writes a one-time snippet to your ~/.zshrc. No changes take effect until you open a new terminal tab.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDesc: Choose your preferred language for the application interface.
settings.themeDesc: Switch between dark and light appearance.
settings.versionDesc: Check for updates and install new versions of KeyDock.
settings.updateError: Update check failed. Please try again.
settings.updateNetworkError: Cannot reach update server. Please check your network connection.
settings.updateTlsError: Secure connection failed. Please check system time and certificates.
settings.updateParseError: Update manifest could not be parsed.

toast.serviceExists: "{{name}}" already exists — form pre-filled, pick a different name.
toast.serviceCreated: Service created. Paste your key and click Add Key.

secretsFieldRow.addToPresetError: Failed to add field to preset
